Class Festival

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.model.Event
com.runticket.model.Festival
public class Festival extends Event
The Festival class represents a festival event and extends the Event class. It provides constructors for creating festival events with various details and a method to print festival information.
Author:
Francisco Garcia
